name: T. Rowe Price Group, Inc.
description: T. Rowe Price Group, Inc. is an American publicly owned global investment management firm that provides a wide range of investment strategies, including mutual funds, subadvisory services, and separate account management. Serving individuals, institutions, and financial intermediaries, the company offers comprehensive retirement plans and financial services. Headquartered in Baltimore, Maryland, T. Rowe Price is recognized for its commitment to active management and long-term investment performance. With a history spanning several decades, the firm continues to be a prominent player in the global financial services industry, managing trillions of dollars in assets for clients worldwide.
